articles.title: Bankman-Fried sold FTX equity to employees at 50% discount in spring: Sources
articles.description: FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried sold equity in the firm at a 50% discount to employees in the spring, sources tell The Block.

articles.title: Chainlink Labs offers proof-of-reserve service for embattled exchanges
articles.description: The company claimed its PoR product can restore trust in crypto exchanges through greater transparency, but not everyone is convinced.

articles.title: FTX and TRON Have Launched a Highly Suspicious Withdrawal Scheme
articles.description: Some FTX users can now withdraw their funds from the exchange, but only by surrendering 80% of the value of their portfolio to arbitrageurs. FTX has a questionable rescue plan for some of its users.The collapsing crypto exchange announced today that it had reached an agreement with the TRON blockchain to allow holders of TRX, BTT, JST, SUN, and HTthe major coins of the TRON ecosystemto...

articles.title: Republican lawmaker claims SEC chair was coordinating with FTX 'to obtain regulatory monopoly'
articles.description: Minnesota Representative Tom Emmer did not provide any evidence to his claim Gary Gensler was "helping SBF and FTX work on legal loopholes," but said he was looking into the matter.

articles.title: Over 80,000 BTC Leaves Exchange Wallets as Traders Lose Confidence In Centralized Exchanges
articles.description: The financial turmoil occasioned by the FTX liquidity crisis has led to investors withdrawing their Bitcoin from Centralized Exchange (CEX) wallets en masse as attention now turns to their dependability.

articles.title: ‘Thank God’ El Salvador doesn’t have any Bitcoin on FTX, CZ clarifies
articles.description: The Binance CEO added that the amount of misinformation going around now is “insane.”

articles.title: FTX reaches out to Kraken for help as it scrambles for $9.4B bailout; Alameda owes exchange $10B
articles.description: After Binance walked away from the FTX takeover deal, the cryptocurrency exchange has turned to Kraken for a possible bailout, Reuters reported, citing two people familiar with the development.

articles.title: Aptos and Google Cloud unveil partnership, plan for accelerator program
articles.description: Aptos has partnered with Google Cloud. The two companies have planned a joint accelerator program and a co-hosted hackathon for next year.

articles.title: FTX CEO Announces Downsizing In Alameda, Promises To Reimburse Users
articles.description: Sam Bankman Fried, CEO at FTX, explained the current state of the crypto exchange platform and their efforts to make users whole. The trading venue collapses after facing a “liquidity crunch” and halting withdrawals. articles.title: Report: Tether freezes $46M of FTX’s USDT, setting new precedent
articles.description: Tether has thus far only frozen USDT funds held in private wallets when requested by law enforcement.

articles.title: Binance CEO says El Salvador told him it doesn’t have funds stuck on FTX
articles.description: Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao said he spoke with El Salvador's president Nayib Bukele, who denied that the Central American country had any funds on FTX's exchange.

articles.title: Tether freezes 46.3 million USDT owned by FTX at request of law enforcement
articles.description: Tether has frozen 46 million of USDT owned by crypto exchange FTX, as a result of a request from law enforcement.

articles.title: Sam Bankman-Fried apologizes for FTX liquidity crisis: ‘I fucked up twice’
articles.description: According to the FTX CEO, Alameda Research was also “winding down trading” but United States-based exchange FTX US “was not financially impacted” by recent events.

articles.description: The world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange, Binance, has released the addresses of its hot and cold wallets and shared details of its holdings.

articles.title: Tether’s USDT falls 1% below dollar peg amid market uncertainty
articles.description: Tether's USDT has fallen slightly below its dollar peg on Thursday morning amid the ongoing uncertainty in crypto markets.

articles.description: The legal team reportedly quit shortly after Binance announced pulling out of the acquisition deal.

articles.title: The Collapse Of One Of The Largest Crypto Platforms Shows How Much Of The Industry Appears To Be “Smoke And Mirrors”: Senator Elizabeth Warren
articles.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren has once again issued a statement calling for an aggressive regulatory stance towards the cryptocurrency industry. Warren took to Twitter to address the recent FTX debacle, further stating how she will continue to push the US Securities and Exchange Commission to establish proper laws and regulatory measures in the industry in order to protect consumers’ interest...

articles.title: US regulators DoJ, SEC, CFTC probe crypto platform FTX
articles.description: US regulators the Department of Justice, the Securities and Exchange Commission and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission are probing beleaguered crypto exchange FTX.

articles.title: TRON-Based USDD Stablecoin on Shaky Ground as It Depegs to $0.97
articles.description: The fallout from this week’s crypto contagion continues to send shockwaves across the industry. The latest digital asset on thin ice is the TRON-based USDD stablecoin.
